title: Create and track esignature documents

posts.author: Eda6195 (Emily Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I have a plug in to create documents from your Monday.com items including subitems. With one status change the whole document is created no messy set up it’s all completed for you.

Unlimited Users
Unlimited Templates
No lock in contracts

This has saved me so much time and money

posts.author: gvelasco1493 (Gerardo Velasco Aguiar )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, this app look amazing, where can i find it?

posts.author: Eda6195 (Emily Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Gerardo, you can check out the website here Holiday Business Solutions or you can book in a call with me in my calendar and we can go through specifically what you need and how we can automate the whole thing for you. There is no cost to the call or the set up and you can use it as much as you want for the first month at no cost so if it doesn’t work out you just stop using it but i’m quite confident you’ll love it Calendar Link

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Nice! And a good opportunity to share that GetSign - The first monday.com eSignature solution made by monday.com Tech partner Jetpack apps is live!

Check out. Always happy to get feedback from this amazing community!
